profile.name: Saikiran Somanagoudar
profile.description: Software engineer specializing in full stack development with React, TypeScript, Node.js, and Python frameworks to deliver robust frontend and backend solutions.

education.major: Bachelor of Technology (BTech) in Computer Science and Engineering

experience.title: Software Engineering AI Trainer
responsibilities: Designed and implemented multi-file JavaScript and TypeScript coding tasks including bug fixes, new features, refactoring, and unit tests using Git and Jenkins for version control and continuous integration, which helped trainees practice real-world frontend engineering and improved their code-quality confidence

Wrote detailed technical specifications and reference implementations, aligning requirements with code behavior and expected outputs while using Redux patterns like normalized state and immutable updates, which reduced specification misunderstandings and accelerated feature delivery

experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Built and shipped interactive, accessible UI components for the AIME/Imagination Project web application using React, Next.js, and TypeScript, creating reusable component libraries that improved team workflow efficiency by 30%

Developed responsive data visualization dashboards integrating backend REST APIs and GraphQL endpoints, implementing efficient state management with Context API, memoization, and data fetching that reduced rendering time by 40%

Improved application performance by 25% through code splitting, lazy loading, and component-level rendering optimizations, and implemented unit tests with Docker-driven CI/CD pipelines to maintain quality and cross-browser compatibility

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
responsibilities: Spearheaded the migration of 30+ client-facing applications to AWS hybrid cloud and Kubernetes clusters, optimizing responsive design and frontend performance to reduce downtime by 25% and improve user experience across browsers and devices

Built interactive single-page components in React with TypeScript, using Redux for state management and async calls to RESTful APIs, implemented unit tests, and cut page load times by 15% while improving Core Web Vitals

Integrated AWS CodeGuru into CI/CD workflows and led code reviews across multiple web applications, reducing manual review effort by 50%, improving deployment reliability, and mentoring junior engineers on frontend best practices

Engineered UI/UX enhancements for enterprise React applications with server-side rendering and accessibility fixes, collaborating with product, design, and backend teams to consume RESTful APIs, which increased average session duration by 20%

projects.name: GIF Enigma
projects.description: GIF Enigma is a word/phrase-guessing game built for Reddit community where players interpret GIFs to uncover a hidden word or phrase. A fun and engaging challenge that tests your ability to think visually and make connections.

projects.name: Pantry Tracker
projects.description: Pantry Tracker is an inventory management application that helps users to keep track of their pantry items. Users can add, update, delete, and search for items in their pantry. The app includes user authentication features, allowing multiple users to securely track and manage their pantry inventory.

projects.name: ConvoOps
projects.description: ConvoOps turns meeting transcripts into real execution, it ingests a PDF transcript, uses an AI pipeline to classify context and extract key decisions, generates a prioritized action plan, and then lets a user review and approve actions before anything runs. Once approved, ConvoOps executes tasks across operational tools like GitHub, Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Drive, and returns clear results with an audit trail, so teams can move from “we discussed it” to “it is done” in one streamlined flow.
